title: Notification No.04/2016-Cus(NT), dated 12.1.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 04/2016-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 12th January, 2016 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Bengaluru City to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Commissioner of Customs, Bengaluru City, Bengaluru; (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, Chennai-II, Custom House, No.60, Rajaji Salai, Chennai, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Amco Batteries Limited, 3rd Floor, Unity Building, Tower Block, JC Road, Bengaluru and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number VIII/48/44/2011-DRI, dated the 27th March, 2015 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Chennai Zonal Unit, Chennai. [F No.437/32/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
